creator: gamato@users.sf.net
text:
Martin Matuska wrote:
> If you need the tclsh symlink install the following port: lang/tcl-wrapper
> and take a look at ${LOCALBASE}/etc/tclsh.conf
>
> If you need the wish symlink install the following port:
> x11-toolkits/tk-wrapper
> and take a look at ${LOCALBASE}/etc/wish.conf
>   

Yes, that would work.  However, as explained in the PR, part of 
devel/mercurial makes use of "wish" and that part does not work after 
the port installation (out-of-the-box).  Therefore, I believe the 
symlink should be created  by one of the ports or devel/mercurial should 
depend on x11-toolkits/tk-wrapper.

Martin
